diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, createMiddlewareBuilder
+- Reads as: TypeScript module ~3000 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../types, ../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Factory helper exports Factory class and factory creation functions for building Hono apps
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: TypeScript utility module ~1100 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../context, ../request/constants, ../types, ../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper provides functions to inspect and extract routing path information
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSContext, createWSMessageEvent, defineWebSocketHelper, WSEvents
+- Reads as: TypeScript WebSocket module ~920 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../context, ../types, ../utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper exports WSContext class and functions for WebSocket upgrades
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie
+- Reads as: TypeScript cookie utility module ~1082 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../context, ../utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper exports functions for reading and writing signed cookies
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: TypeScript testing module ~245 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../client, ../client/types, ../context, ../hono, ../types, ../utils/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper provides testClient for client-side testing
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: TypeScript runtime detection module ~593 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../context
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper exports runtime detection utilities for different environments
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, rawCssString
+- Reads as: TypeScript CSS module ~1808 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../helper/html, ../jsx/constants, ../jsx/dom/css, ../utils/html
+- Safe summary: CSS helper exports CSS-in-JS utilities with class name generation and styles
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, minify, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon
+- Reads as: TypeScript CSS utilities module ~2481 tokens
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS common utilities provide class name hashing, minification, and shared functions
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: TypeScript proxy module ~1475 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../http-exception, ../utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper exports proxy function for forwarding requests to another server
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName, RouteData
+- Reads as: TypeScript dev utilities module ~559 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/color, ../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper exports utilities for inspecting and displaying route information
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: TypeScript HTML utilities module ~473 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper exports html and raw functions for buffer-based HTML escaping
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: TypeScript SSG index re-exporting submodules
+- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./plugins, ./middleware, ./utils
+- Safe summary: SSG helper index exports static site generator functions and plugins
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, filterStaticGenerateRoutes
+- Reads as: TypeScript SSG core module ~3570 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../ssg/middleware, ../ssg/utils
+- Safe summary: SSG core implements static site generation with content fetching and file saving
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: TypeScript SSG utilities module ~656 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler, ../ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG utilities provide path manipulation and route filtering helpers
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: TypeScript SSG middleware module ~527 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../ssg/utils, ../context, ../types
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware exports context tokens and middleware handlers for SSG control
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: TypeScript streaming index re-exporting submodules
+- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper index exports stream, SSE, and text streaming functions
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: TypeScript streaming core module ~366 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../context, ../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Streaming core exports stream function creating TransformStream-based APIs
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: TypeScript SSE streaming module ~700 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../context, ../utils/html, ../utils/stream, ./utils, ./stream.ts
+- Safe summary: SSE module exports SSE streaming API for Server-Sent Events with data formatting
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: TypeScript text streaming module ~126 tokens
+- Neighbor files: ../context, ../utils/stream, ./stream
+- Safe summary: Text streaming module exports streamText function for streaming text responses
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: TypeScript accepts index re-exporting acce
